name: Scroll-Pinned Narrative
description: Scroll-pinned narrative section: 3-5 numbered steps scroll past on the left while a single 4:5 image panel pins on the right and cross-fades between step images as each block enters the viewport. On mobile the layout collapses to inline stacked steps.

descriptions.descriptive: Two-column layout on desktop: the left column scrolls a vertical sequence of numbered steps (label, title, description), while the right column pins via sticky positioning and renders one image at a time. Each step image is mounted into the pinned slot with opacity and a subtle 1.04 -> 1 scale transform driven by useScroll progress. Below the lg breakpoint the section becomes a clean stacked story — each step renders inline with its own image, no pinning, no cross-fade.
descriptions.usage: Use to walk a visitor through a process, methodology, or product story that benefits from staying anchored — agency processes, onboarding flows, brand narratives, scientific protocols. Place mid-page after a calm hero; do not stack against StickyCards or ParallaxContent.
descriptions.audienceFit: Editorial and luxury brands, agency methodology pages, premium B2B SaaS storytelling, and any page where the narrative gain from pinning outweighs the cost of giving up vertical real estate.
